diary_entries.entry: The aurora changed everything. I feel pragmatic about our future here.
The aurora changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
Year 49 on Mars. Rare Martian aurora lights the sky. Morale is hopeful. We have 803 food units left.

meta_awareness: Lyra (year 49): 'The sub-sim predicted our decision before we made it. Does that mean our decisions are predictable too — from above?'
